programme.title: The Truth About Getting Fit At Home
programme.desc: For many people, just six minutes of training a week is enough.Mehreen Baig will check what types of exercises we should do at home.He will talk to scientists and conduct experiments.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Another edition of the extremely popular culinary show.To impress the jurors and overcome the next stages of the program, the competitors must reach the heights of their skills.

programme.title: Windsor Castle
programme.desc: Documentarians investigate the secrets of Windsor Castle.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Another installment of the extremely popular show in which twelve confectioners with no professional experience compete for the title of the best.Every week, the competitors receive difficult tasks to verify their talent and culinary skills.Their struggles are assessed by the famous baker Paul Hollywood and the restaurateur Prue Leith, both of whom are very demanding and critical.Each task is time-limited.Time pressure is difficult to bear.The weakest competitors will quickly lose their chance to win the title of best confectioner.The show is hosted by Noeal Fielding and Sandi Toksvig.

programme.title: The Great British Sewing Bee: Wardrobe Staples Week
The Great British Sewing Bee
programme.desc: Tailoring enthusiasts compete in the program, undertaking difficult tasks that test their skills, creativity and work under pressure.They are competing for the title of best non-professional tailor in the UK.

programme.title: The Truth about Alcohol
programme.desc: British doctor Javid Abdelmoneim shows the impact of alcoholic beverages on our body and the risks associated with their consumption.To present the harmful effects of alcohol, he uses the latest research results.It explains, among other things, why some people get drunk faster.It also verifies the common opinion that drinking wine is good for your health, and whether a drink before going to bed actually makes you sleep better.We will also learn what effect alcohol has on our stomachs and the feeling of hunger.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies
programme.desc: Dr. Christian Jessen and his team of doctors help people suffering from rare and very embarrassing diseases.In this series, medics will face really difficult challenges.

programme.title: Skin A\u0026E
programme.desc: The fourth installment of the program revealing the stories of people struggling with skin diseases.They often cause unpleasant or embarrassing symptoms.A team of dermatologists will try to help patients.

programme.title: Windsor Castle
programme.desc: Documentarians investigate the secrets of Windsor Castle.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Another installment of the extremely popular show in which twelve confectioners with no professional experience compete for the title of the best.Every week, the competitors receive difficult tasks to verify their talent and culinary skills.Their struggles are assessed by the famous baker Paul Hollywood and the restaurateur Prue Leith, both of whom are very demanding and critical.Each task is time-limited.Time pressure is difficult to bear.The weakest competitors will quickly lose their chance to win the title of best confectioner.The show is hosted by Noeal Fielding and Sandi Toksvig.

programme.title: Windsor Castle
programme.desc: Documentarians investigate the secrets of Windsor Castle.

programme.title: How To Lose Weight Well 3
programme.desc: Another installment of the program in which Dr. Xand van Tullekenem and the world-famous dietitian Hala El-Shafie help participants lose excess weight using diets prepared especially for them.A doctor checks whether the bacteria in our gut may actually be the key to weight loss, tests the popular DASH diet and assists a pair of gym friends who want to lose weight.Viewers will also learn interesting facts about, among others:Gwyneth Paltrow's cleansing diet, the weight loss plan proposed by the British Health Service, the impact of alcohol on our weight and interesting gadgets for fitness exercises.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Another installment of the extremely popular show in which twelve confectioners with no professional experience compete for the title of the best.Every week, the competitors receive difficult tasks to verify their talent and culinary skills.Their struggles are assessed by the famous baker Paul Hollywood and the restaurateur Prue Leith, both of whom are very demanding and critical.Each task is time-limited.Time pressure is difficult to bear.The weakest competitors will quickly lose their chance to win the title of best confectioner.The show is hosted by Noeal Fielding and Sandi Toksvig.

programme.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
programme.desc: Tailoring enthusiasts compete in the program, undertaking difficult tasks that test their skills, creativity and work under pressure.They are competing for the title of best non-professional tailor in the UK.

programme.title: How To Lose Weight Well 3
programme.desc: Another installment of the program in which Dr. Xand van Tullekenem and the world-famous dietitian Hala El-Shafie help participants lose excess weight using diets prepared especially for them.A doctor checks whether the bacteria in our gut may actually be the key to weight loss, tests the popular DASH diet and assists a pair of gym friends who want to lose weight.Viewers will also learn interesting facts about, among others:Gwyneth Paltrow's cleansing diet, the weight loss plan proposed by the British Health Service, the impact of alcohol on our weight and interesting gadgets for fitness exercises.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me: Supersized 20
programme.desc: Another edition of the culinary show in which amateur chefs organize a party and invite the other participants of the program.Each cooking enthusiast is subject to strict assessment of his guests.

programme.title: Britain's Most Expensive Houses
programme.desc: Real estate agents accompanied by cameras show clients around the most expensive and amazing properties.Buyers have unlimited funds and are very demanding.

programme.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
programme.desc: Tailoring enthusiasts compete in the program, undertaking difficult tasks that test their skills, creativity and work under pressure.They are competing for the title of best non-professional tailor in the UK.
